fact-ci-build.text: CI builds nano firmware successfully with the 0003 patch applied.

fact-flash.text: Firmware deploys via MSD: pluto.frm copied to MSD volume on macOS host, volume ejected. Device becomes accessible over serial after reboot.

fact-reboot-5.text: 5 consecutive reboots complete without free_pgtables panic or kernel oops in dmesg.

fact-soak.text: Device runs normally (SSH reachable, IIO context serves, no kernel splats) for at least 90 minutes after boot.

fact-recording-mmap.text: Recording device node (/dev/maia-sdr-recording) opens, mmaps, and munmaps without crash or kernel warning.

fact-rxbuffer-mmap.text: Rxbuffer device node (/dev/maia-sdr-rxbuffer) opens, mmaps, cacheinv ioctl returns success, munmaps cleanly.
